name: Imperial Fried Walnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 3 cups water to a rolling boil in a deep saucepan.
2. Add the walnuts and boil for 1 minute.
3. Rinse the walnuts under hot water and drain.
4. Toss the walnuts with sugar.
5. Heat vegetable oil to 350 degrees Fahrenheit in a deep saucepan.
6. With a slotted spoon, add half of the walnuts to the oil.
7. Fry, stirring constantly, for about 5 minutes or until golden.
8. Repeat with the remaining nuts.
9. Sprinkle with salt.
10. Cool on foil-lined trays, separating pieces.
11. Store in an airtight container.
